---
id: handle-switch-org
title: "Switch active organization"
description: "Switches the authenticated user's active organization context. Re-issues a new access token (and refresh token) scoped to the chosen org. The user must be a member of the target org"
sidebar_label: "Switch active organization"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Switch active organization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/auth/switch-org"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Switches the authenticated user's active organization context. Re-issues a new access token (and refresh token) scoped to the chosen org. The user must be a member of the target org

</ParamsDetails>
